nodes.context: A faction within the Corleone Mafia family of the Sicilian Mafia, formed in the 1970s. It dominated the Mafia in the 1980s and 1990s.
The Mafia family based in Corleone, Sicily. The Corleonesi clan was a faction within this family.
The overarching Mafia organization in Sicily. The Corleonesi clan was a faction within it.
A faction of Palermo Mafia families opposed to the Corleonesi during the Second Mafia War.
An American Mafia family. Reportedly sent an explosives expert to help the Corleonesi with the Capaci bombing.
The American branch of the Mafia. Affiliated with rivals of the Corleonesi but later cooperated.

edges.context: The Corleonesi clan was a faction within the Corleone Mafia family.
The Corleonesi clan was a faction within the Sicilian Mafia.
The Corleonesi opposed the Palermitans during the Second Mafia War in the early 1980s.
The Gambino crime family sent an explosives expert to help the Corleonesi plan the Capaci bombing.
The American Cosa Nostra, through the Gambinos, cooperated with the Corleonesi despite earlier affiliations with rivals.
